sets.title: Set codes to scrape
sets.description: Scryfall set codes to scrape. Each code fetches the first N cards by collector number.

cardsPerSet.title: Cards per set
cardsPerSet.description: Maximum number of cards to scrape per set, ordered by collector number.

salesWindowDays.title: Sales history window (days)
salesWindowDays.description: Number of days of sales history to retrieve from TCGPlayer. Supports 30 or 90.

topListingsCount.title: Top listings count
topListingsCount.description: Number of cheapest listings to include in inventory_snapshot.top_listings.

webhookUrl.title: Webhook URL
webhookUrl.description: SPT backend ingest endpoint. If provided, results are POSTed here instead of Apify Dataset. E.g. https://your-spt-api.com/ingest/tcgplayer/batch

webhookAuthToken.title: Webhook auth token
webhookAuthToken.description: Bearer token sent in the Authorization header of every webhook POST. Keep this secret.

webhookDeliveryMode.title: Webhook delivery mode
webhookDeliveryMode.description: batch: POST all records once at the end. per-record: POST each card record immediately after scraping.

maxConcurrency.title: Max concurrency
maxConcurrency.description: Maximum number of TCGPlayer pages scraped in parallel. Keep low (2-3) to avoid DataDome detection.

delayBetweenRequestsMs.title: Delay between requests (ms)
delayBetweenRequestsMs.description: Base delay in milliseconds between TCGPlayer requests. Actual delay adds random jitter up to +2000ms.

maxRetries.title: Max retries
maxRetries.description: Maximum number of retry attempts per URL on DataDome block or network error.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. Residential US proxies strongly recommended for DataDome bypass.
